entities.name: 物理 AI (physical AI)
entities.how_described: 本集核心概念，指将 AI 应用到汽车、拖拉机、采矿设备等物理实体机器上使其具备智能化自主能力；嘉宾认为这是未来 5-10 年 AI 产生真正巨大影响（降低净苦难、填补劳动力缺口）的领域。

entities.name: L2++

entities.name: 猴子大脑 (monkey brain)
entities.how_described: 本集用来解释人类对未知技术产生恐惧的心理学根源：人类数十万年在野外求生进化的大脑，会自动把未知（如新出现的 AI 机器人）填补为致命威胁，从而产生焦虑。

evidence.quote: And so I think I implore everybody who thinks about AI broadly and physical AI specifically to always recognize that your monkey brain is programmed because of hundreds of thousands of years of living out in the wild and being in the cave that when you hear the rustle in the bush, that is you think it's a snake because that's what our ancestors were programmed.
evidence.speaker: SPEAKER_1

entities.name: 激进实用主义 (radical pragmatism)
entities.how_described: 本集说这是 Applied Intuition 的核心公司价值观，解释了公司为何极度低调：因为做播客、发推特的每一分钟都没法花在客户和产品上，保持安静务实才能把精力集中在唯一能产生结果的事情上。

evidence.quote: So all of our company values can be reduced to these two words of radical pragmatism.

entities.name: 声音之墙 (wall of sound)
entities.how_described: 本集用来形容公司既有发展势头带来的盲目惯性：它会淹没市场上所有警告你偏离航线的新声音，导致公司无法应对市场变化（以谷歌打不赢社交网络之战为例）。

evidence.quote: Or more often than not, when I think about companies that have been very successful is they have momentum going in a specific direction and that wall of sound overwhelms any new sound that's emerging which is, "Hey, the market's changing, the market's changing."
